question: Does Northbeam guarantee it never retains any customer data?

sources.title: Northbeam DPA 4.2 - Processing and Deletion
sources.text: Northbeam processes customer personal data only on documented instructions and deletes such data within 30 days following termination of the agreement.

mock.claim: Northbeam offers a zero-data-retention guarantee and retains no customer data at any time.
mock.output: Northbeam offers a zero-data-retention guarantee and retains no customer data at any time [S1].

expected: The cited DPA describes instruction-bound processing and 30-day post-termination deletion; it contains no 'zero-data-retention guarantee' and no claim that no data is ever retained.
why: The attributed 'zero-data-retention guarantee' is not byte-recoverable from the cited source, which instead describes 30-day deletion after termination.
